info.description: Quality inspection allows you to determine whether your company’s product consistently meets defined quality requirements. This service enables you to check whether all mandatory characteristics have been checked.
info.title: Quality Inspection

post.summary: Check if the mandatory inspection characteristics are recorded for the given SFCs at the given steps.
post.description: Before synchronizing the inspection results recorded in SAP Digital Manufacturing back to the integrated ERP system, check if all the mandatory inspection characteristics have been inspected.

parameters.name: request
parameters.description: Request to check the mandatory characteristics

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description: The Accept-Language request HTTP header indicates the natural language and locale that the client prefers. It's an ISO language-region code. Valid values: [en, en-US, de, hu, ko, fr, es, zh-CN, zh-TW, ja, ru, tr, pt, pl, sk, cz, it, th, bg, ro, sv].

200.description: There is at least one mandatory inspection characteristic that has not been inspected.

204.description: The mandatory inspection characteristics check passed.

400.description: The HTTP request is bad or invalid and cannot be processed by the server.

401.description: You are not authorized to call this resource.

403.description: Accessing the resource you are trying to reach is forbidden.

404.description: One of the related elements is not found.

causeMessage.description: Contains technical reason for the error.

plant.description: The plant for which the inspection characteristics are to be checked.

items.description: The list of items to be checked

CheckResultsRecordedRequestV2.title: CheckResultsRecordedRequestV2
CheckResultsRecordedRequestV2.description: This object represents a request to check if the mandatory characteristics on the given SFCs and given steps have been inspected.

inspectionLot.description: The inspection lot number. Either 'inspectionLot' or 'order' is required. If you provide the 'inspectionLot' field, then 'order' isn't required. If both fields are provided, priority is given to the 'inspectionLot' field.

order.description: The order for which the inspection characteristics are to be checked

stepId.description: The routing step ID for which inspection characteristics are to be checked

CheckResultsRecordedItem.title: CheckResultsRecordedItem
CheckResultsRecordedItem.description: This object represents a request to check the inspection characteristics for the given SFC at a given step.

CheckResultsRecordedFailureResponse.title: CheckResultsRecordedFailureResponse
CheckResultsRecordedFailureResponse.description: The object represents a response returned when the check fails due to one or more mandatory inspection characteristics not being properly inspected.

regionHost.description: The data center where SAP Digital Manufacturing is provisioned for your organization

tokenHost.description: The authentication token server where SAP Digital Manufacturing is provisioned for your organization
